credit: Alessandro Paluzzi surfaced the app on X
title: Meta quietly launches Pocket for prompt-made mini apps and games
friendlyTitle: Meta is testing AI-made mini games
summary: TechCrunch reports that Meta has quietly released Pocket, an experimental app for creating and sharing small interactive games and apps from text prompts. The app appears linked to Meta’s acquisition of the team behind Gizmo and is still early enough that Meta had not formally announced it.
friendlySummary: Meta’s new Pocket app lets people create small playable experiences by describing what they want in text.
whyItMatters: Prompt-to-app creation is moving into consumer social products, not just developer tools. If this format catches on, everyday users may start making lightweight interactive media the way they now make short videos or image posts.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This could make simple app and game creation feel more like posting on social media.
